title: What is our SAUCE for character blood types
display_title: What is our SAUCE for character blood types
wikitext:
[]: What is our "SAUCE" for character blood-types?             Quote Post by V » Tue Dec 04, 2007 2:12 pm Character blood types are often given in anime, due to the Japanese blood-type theory of personality (it's like astrology/hororscope) over there Japan is something like 99% Rh positive, so instead of having 8 types they simiply ignore the Rh positive or negative and there are thus only 4 blood type groupings under the system (A, B, O, AB) We know from Episode 08 that Misato is type A, from when she flashed her ID card. We know from Episode 03 that Kensuke is type A, and Toji is type B. I have seen numerous fansites claiming what the other characters' blood types are. I am looking to establish a reliable...."SAUCE"? as the saying goes?....a reliable source on what the blood types of all other characters are. Because if I don't see an official source I'm going to dismiss such info from other fansites was fanwankery.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Tue Dec 04, 2007 2:25 pm My guess is that the other blood types are, like many of the birth dates, borrowed from the voice actors.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Tue Dec 04, 2007 2:26 pm Here's one of the places: http://evaotaku.com/html/rcb-glossary.html

[]:             Quote Post by V » Tue Dec 04, 2007 7:13 pm "Red Cross Book" is good enough to be "official" (for such a trivial matter) though I do prefer on-screen evidence when we can find it (well, lots of "things visible briefly on files Misato is holding in a scene" will turn up as the EvaCommentary continues). Type A: Shinji, Gendo, Shigeru, Maya, Misato, Kaji, Type B: Ritsuko, Makato Type O: Asuka Type AB: Fuyutsuki Interestingly, not blood type is given for Rei. I'd assume she has Yui's blood type, but I can find no blood type listed for Yui either. Oh crud.....That was the End of Eva Theatrical Booklet. The Death and Rebirth Booklet contradicts it: D&R says that Asuka is Type A. Simply because so many other characters are Type A, and Asuka is the ONLY Type O, I suspect that is a mistake. No type is ever given for Hikari.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Dec 04, 2007 10:01 pm V, you NEED to start taking sub-primary canon seriously if you're going to be an effective Minionister for a compilation of NGE information. Blood types are reiterated in Chronicle (handy-dandy source as that is). Hikari and Rei aren't provided anything. It gives Asuka as Type A. I haven't acquired Yui's entry yet, so I can't comment there. I'll keep my eyes peeled for additional mentions of Asuka's BT in anything else I might have lying around to see if a consensus can be established.

[]:             Quote Post by V » Wed Dec 05, 2007 5:26 pm Reichu wrote: V, you NEED to start taking sub-primary canon seriously if you're going to be an effective Minionister for a compilation of NGE information.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Wed Dec 05, 2007 9:37 pm "A" for "Asuka"!

[]:             Quote Post by V » Wed Dec 05, 2007 10:08 pm Sachiel_13 wrote: "A" for "Asuka"!
